data.title: Advocates Urge Biden To Free Non-Violent Cannabis Offenders After Pardoning His Son
data.description: President Joe Biden has granted a full and unconditional pardon to his son, Hunter Biden, in the federal felony gun and tax cases, as his tenure as the 46th president of the United States comes to an end. That's according to an official statement from the White House on Sunday.In the aftermath of Biden's controversial decision, which raised debate from both Democrats and Republicans but received endorsement from former Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), cannabis advocates are getting louder.Radio host Charlamagne the God criticized the pardon, pointing out that Biden could also pardon individuals imprisoned for non-violent cannabis offenses.

data.title: JPMorgan Bets On Natural Gas For 2025: Upgrades ConocoPhillips, Lowers 3 Energy Stocks
data.description: Natural gas producers likely to benefit in 2025 due to LNG exports, electrification, and switch from coal. ConocoPhillips upgraded, Devon and SM downgraded.
